chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Begins with sa’y Before Tawaf or Performs Tawaf and Delays sa’y

text: 2827 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَأَعْيَا أَ يُؤَخِّرُ اَلطَّوَافَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ إِلَى غَدٍ قَالَ «لاَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2827 - Al-'Ala reported from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who narrated from one of the holy Imams (as) saying: "I asked him about a man who circumambulated the House (Ka'bah) and became weary. Can he delay the Sa'y between Safa and Marwah until the next day?"
Imam (as) replied: "No."
